# REPOSITORY_RELATIONSHIP_MAP.md
## HCI AI Operating System — Repository Relationship Map

**Organization:** Hendrickson Construction, Inc.
**Owner:** @buck-HCI-AI
**Generated:** 2026-06-26
**Generated By:** Browser Claude (GitHub Administrator)
**Architecture Decision Date:** 2026-06-26

---

## Repository Architecture Decision

### Current State (2026-06-26)

**This is a single-repository architecture.**

`buck-HCI-AI/HCI_AI_Operating_System` is both the Program Repository and the Implementation Repository. It contains:
- Governance and operating standards (Sprint 0 layer)
- Live implementation code (WF-007, APIs, integrations)
- Source code directories (03_Source_Code, 04_Workflows)
- Pre-existing implementation from Claude Code

### Architecture Decision: Unified Repository (Recommended)

Based on the audit of this repository, a **single unified repository** is the correct architecture for the current stage of HCI AI. The reasoning:

1. **Active implementation already exists here** — WF-007 is live; source code is in 03_Source_Code
2. **Separation adds overhead with no benefit at this scale** — one owner, one team, one product
3. **The governance and implementation layers are separable by directory**, not by repository
4. **A separate implementation repository would require cross-repo coordination** that adds complexity without value
5. **The Constitution already defines what each AI agent owns** — no repo split needed

> Architecture Review Required: If a separate implementation repository exists (Claude Code's repo), the recommended action is **to merge it INTO this repository**, not to maintain two permanent repos. This decision requires @buck-HCI-AI approval.

---

## Repository Layer Map

```
buck-HCI-AI/HCI_AI_Operating_System (single repo)
│
├── PROGRAM LAYER (governance, standards, sprint management)
│   ├── HCI_AI_CONSTITUTION.md          ← Supreme law
│   ├── AI_TEAM_CHARTER.md              ← Who does what
│   ├── AUTOMATION_GOVERNANCE.md        ← What is automated
│   ├── APPROVAL_GATES.md               ← What requires human approval
│   ├── SPRINT_OPERATING_MODEL.md       ← How work flows
│   ├── AI_WORKFLOW_ROLES.md            ← Agent-to-workflow matrix
│   ├── PROJECT.md                      ← Master roadmap + backlog
│   ├── TASKS.md                        ← Active task register
│   ├── CONTRIBUTING.md                 ← Contribution rules
│   ├── PROGRAM_REPOSITORY_STATUS.md    ← Current repo health
│   ├── PROGRAM_REPOSITORY_INVENTORY.md ← All files inventoried
│   ├── REPOSITORY_RELATIONSHIP_MAP.md  ← This document
│   ├── IMPLEMENTATION_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md ← Integration strategy
│   ├── LIVE_PROJECT_STATE_TEMPLATE.md  ← Shared agent state
│   └── .github/                        ← GitHub config (templates, CODEOWNERS)
│
├── WORKSTREAM LAYER (per-system design docs)
│   └── houzz/                          ← Houzz Browser Intelligence (6 docs)
│
├── IMPLEMENTATION LAYER (code, workflows, data)
│   ├── 03_Source_Code/                 ← Python APIs, integrations, agents
│   │   ├── api/
│   │   ├── ingestion/
│   │   ├── integrations/
│   │   └── workflows/
│   ├── 04_Workflows/                   ← n8n workflow JSON exports
│   │   └── WF-007_Bid_Leveling_Engine.json  ← LIVE
│   ├── 05_Database/                    ← Postgres schema, Qdrant definitions
│   ├── 06_Project_Documentation/       ← Per-project docs
│   └── docker-compose.yml              ← Docker stack
│
└── KNOWLEDGE LAYER (reference, assets, archive)
    ├── 01_Engineering_Library/
    ├── AI_TEAM/
    ├── BOOK_00/
    ├── SESSION_STARTUP/
    └── scripts/
```

## AI Agent Territory Map

| Agent | Primary Territory | Can Read | Cannot Modify |
|---|---|---|---|
| ChatGPT | PROJECT.md, TASKS.md, CURRENT_SPRINT.md | Everything | Production code, live systems |
| Claude Code | 03_Source_Code/, 04_Workflows/, 05_Database/ | Everything | Governance docs (without sprint task) |
| Browser Claude | .github/, root governance docs, workstream design | Everything | Application source code |
| Codex | 15_Tests/, all code | Everything | Cannot merge PRs |
| n8n | 04_Workflows/ (executes, not edits) | All outputs | Governance docs, CRM (without Gate H) |
| @buck-HCI-AI (Human) | Everything | Everything | Nothing — supreme authority |

## External System Relationship Map

```
HCI AI Operating System (this repo)
│
├── READS FROM:
│   ├── HubSpot CRM (API — Sprint 2)
│   ├── Google Drive (OAuth — Sprint 2)
│   ├── Microsoft 365 / Graph API (Active)
│   ├── Google Sheets — Bid Tracking (Active)
│   └── Houzz Pro (Browser Agent — Sprint 1)
│
├── WRITES TO (with approval gates):
│   ├── HubSpot CRM → Gate H (human approval required)
│   ├── Google Drive → Gate D (AI draft, human review)
│   ├── GitHub main branch → Gate G (human merge required)
│   └── Production systems → Gate P (human approval required)
│
└── ORCHESTRATES VIA:
    └── n8n (localhost:5678)
        ├── WF-007 — Bid Leveling Engine (LIVE)
        ├── AUTO-001 — Daily status report (Sprint 1)
        ├── AUTO-002 — Workflow health check (Sprint 1)
        └── [AUTO-003 through AUTO-025 — Sprint 1-4]
```

---

## If a Separate Implementation Repository Exists

If Claude Code operates from a separate repository (not this one), the following relationship applies during the integration period:

```
Program Repository (this repo — buck-HCI-AI/HCI_AI_Operating_System)
├── AUTHORITATIVE FOR: Governance, Standards, Sprint Plans, Architecture
├── CONSUMES FROM Implementation Repo: None (reads implementation via Claude Code)
└── COORDINATES VIA: LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md (shared state document)

Implementation Repository (Claude Code's repo — if separate)
├── AUTHORITATIVE FOR: Code, APIs, Workflows, Database
├── GOVERNED BY: This repo's Constitution and Approval Gates
├── SPRINT TASKS FROM: This repo's TASKS.md
└── MERGE TARGET: Should be merged into this repo (see IMPLEMENTATION_INTEGRATION_PLAN.md)
```

**Coordination Protocol (during integration period):**
1. ChatGPT authors sprint tasks in this repo (PROJECT.md + TASKS.md)
2. Claude Code implements in implementation repo (or 03_Source_Code/ here)
3. Browser Claude maintains this repo's governance layer
4. n8n executes automations defined in both repos
5. LIVE_PROJECT_STATE.md is updated by any agent after significant state change

---

## Recommended Final Architecture

```
Single Repository: buck-HCI-AI/HCI_AI_Operating_System
├── /                    ← Program governance (Browser Claude territory)
├── houzz/               ← Houzz workstream design
├── 03_Source_Code/      ← All implementation code (Claude Code territory)
├── 04_Workflows/        ← n8n workflow exports (n8n territory)
├── 05_Database/         ← DB schemas and definitions
├── reports/             ← Auto-generated reports (all agents)
│   ├── houzz/           ← Houzz extraction outputs
│   └── sprint/          ← Sprint summaries
└── [numbered dirs]      ← Knowledge and reference
```

**One repo. One governance layer. One sprint backlog. One truth.**
